title: 2022 Benetti Motopanfilo | 121ft

specs.Generators:
2x Kohler 70EFOZDJ 70 KW  at 1,500 RPM 
  
 Hours (01/26): Port - 9002 hours | Starboard - 8909 hours
specs.Air Conditioning: upgraded FLOW frequency drives for soft startup
specs.Name: KOJU

description:
KOJU accommodates 10 guests in five elegantly appointed cabins, making her ideal for families or mixed groups. Her full-beam master suite on the main deck is flooded with natural light and features a king-size bed, his-and-hers en suite bathrooms, a private study, and a vanity. Four additional guest cabins continue the soft curves and cocoon-like comfort throughout, providing a restful retreat for every guest.
Inside, floor-to-ceiling windows, clever use of mirrors, and an open-plan layout create a bright, sophisticated environment connected to the surrounding sea. The main salon is perfect for socializing, with panoramic views, a cylindrical bar cabinet, and a formal dining area, while seamless flow to the aft cockpit outdoor lounge ensures effortless indoor-outdoor living.
KOJU’s exterior spaces are designed for every guest and occasion. A foredeck lounge with a large pool and plush sun pads caters to sun-seekers, while covered areas provide shade. Multiple alfresco dining areas allow guests to enjoy meals with panoramic views. The “cocoon-style” observation deck offers an intimate setting for morning coffee or evening cocktails. The spacious Hamptons-style beach club invites relaxation at sea level, featuring a retractable canopy for shade and easy access to water toys.
A multi-award-winning yacht, KOJU has been recognized by the World Yacht Trophies, Boat International Superyacht Awards, and the Design & Innovation Awards. She is a proven favorite on the charter market and is maintained in pristine condition by her world-class captain and crew.
Powered by twin MAN 1400HP engines, KOJU has a top speed of 18 knots and an impressive range of 3,800 nautical miles, ideal for long-distance adventures. Ready to welcome her next guests, KOJU represents a rare opportunity to charter a brand-new Benetti pedigree vessel combining style, space, and unforgettable experiences at sea.
Key Features:
Unprecedented Sense of Internal And External Space on a  Boat of this Size
Built To Reg Code A (Commercial Compliance)
Cocoon: Observatory Deck On The Hardtop
Custom Jacuzzi On The Foredeck
5 Staterooms; On-Deck Primary Suite W/ Private Study
Zero-Speed Stabilizers
World-Renowned Interior By Famed Designers Lazzarini And Pickering With The Use Of Loro Piana Fabrics
Custom Furnishings By Lazzarini And Pickering
Delivered As A Turn-Key Program With Premier Water Sports, Gym, Galley, And Service Equipment
All Available Options/Upgrades Offered Were Selected During Construction
Awards: KOJU is a multi-award-winning yacht
World Yacht Trophies Award
Best Innovation (30m - 60m) Boat International Superyacht Award
Semi Displacement of planing motor yachts (35m - 39m) Boat International Design and Innovation Award
Outstanding exterior design (24m - 39m)
Best New Series

ACCOMMODATIONS
KOJU's contemporary interior, light-flooded rooms, and modern features are inspired by the glamorous Motopanfilo yachts built over 50 years ago. Accommodating ten overnight guests in five cabins, she has a multitude of communal spaces and amenities to offer.
Her exterior offers a space for every guest and occasion, including a foredeck outdoor lounge with a large pool, plush sun pads for sun-lovers, as well as covered areas for shade-seekers. Ample seating and tables for al fresco dining can be found throughout, as well as a unique and intimate space to take in the sweeping views in her 'cocoon-style’ observation deck. KOJU’s spacious Hamptons-style beach club invites guests to relax in the sun at sea level. It features a retractable fabric canopy providing ample shade when needed and a platform for easy access when enjoying water toys.
Creating a bright, sophisticated environment, her wide-spanning floor-to-ceiling windows, clever use of mirrors, and open-plan interior provide panoramic views and connects guests with the surrounding ocean, whether lounging in her main salon, sipping cocktails at the bar or in her formal dining area. She also provides a seamless flow from the interior main deck lounge to the main deck aft cockpit outdoor lounge. KOJU boasts a vast full-beam on-deck primary suite, flooded with natural light from the surrounding panoramic windows. Featuring a king-size bed, his and hers ensuite bathrooms, a vanity, and a private study. Her four additional well-appointed guest cabins carry the soft curves throughout the vessel, accentuating the hull's shape and providing a cozy cocoon feel for a comfortable retreat.

Shelving over battery box - desk
Shelving over engine forward

SAFETY & SECURITY EQUIPMENT
Safety
Life Rafts - Four (4) life rafts. 2 X eight (8) people each and 2 X ten (10) people each fitted with hydrostatic release, provided on sun deck.
Medical Kit
Fire fighting
Fire pumps - Gianneschi pumps and blowers
Bilge pumps - Gianneschi pumps and blowers
Emergency bilge/fire pumps - Gianneschi pumps and blowers
Engine room fire extinguishing system - Marine Fire
Fire Extinguishers - Portable CO2/foam/powder fire extinguishers
Fire Nozzles
Fire Hoses
Fireman Axe
Firefighting Blanket - fire blanket stored in the galley
Emergency Lighting System
An emergency lighting system is installed in accordance with the Classification Society requirements using 24V DC batteries and a dedicated battery charger.
In correspondence with stairs, corridors, wheelhouse, crew mess, and any room exit and escapes, emergency lights are provided. They switch on automatically in case of failure of the AC system.
Accommodation emergency lights are normally supplied with 24V DC power by 220V AC main circuit. An automatic device is provided for switching from the main circuit to the 24V DC emergency one. In the engine and technical rooms, suitable lamps are fitted in correspondence of escape
Intercom System
One Emergency internal communication system as per Classification Society and Flag Authority requirements in: the wheelhouse, engine room, and emergency steering station.
Security System
Dahua 9 CCTV DVR system with fixed & remote monitoring
TANK CAPACITIES
Gross Tonnage: 297 GT
Net Tonnage: 89 NT
Displacement Light Ship: 185 T
Displacement Half Load:  215 T
Displacement Full Load:  230 T
Fuel Capacity:  9246 USG / 35000 LT
Fresh Water Capacity: 1056 USG / 4000 LT
Grey/Black Water: 924 USG / 3500 LT
Water Makers: 1320 USG / 5000 LT
Clean Lube Oil: 79 USG/300LT
Dirty Lube Oil: 79 USG/300L
Day Tank: 3,170 USG/12000L

2 x Yamaha VX Cruiser HO jet skis
1 x Flyboard
2 x Seabobs
2 x Stand up paddle boards (Bote)
2 x Kayaks (Fun Air)
1 x Lift eFoil
1 x Big Mable tube (donut)
1 x Pancake tube (donut)
1 x Wakeboard
Fun Air inflatable pool with loungers
Snorkel equipment
Sporting equipment & weights
Fun Air Slide (Bridge Deck)
Aquabana Pool/Dock
EXCLUSIONS
A detailed list will be provided upon request.
Owner's personal effects
Artwork, statues, and sculptures
Tender - 34’ Intrepid
Fishing equipment

Emergency Lighting System
An emergency lighting system is installed in accordance with the Classification Society requirements using 24V DC batteries and a dedicated battery charger.
In correspondence with stairs, corridors, wheelhouse, crew mess, and any room exit and escapes, emergency lights are provided. They switch on automatically in case of failure of the AC system.
Accommodation emergency lights are normally supplied with 24V DC power by 220V AC main circuit. An automatic device is provided for switching from the main circuit to the 24V DC emergency one. In the engine and technical rooms, suitable lamps are fitted in correspondence of escape
Intercom System
One Emergency internal communication system as per Classification Society and Flag Authority requirements in: the wheelhouse, engine room, and emergency steering station.
